title: Search Wikipedia
description: Learn to search Wikipedia using AI-powered desktop automation — open the browser, search, and navigate to an article.

tasks.title: Search Wikipedia for Google Cloud Platform
tasks.sonic_prompt: Let me show you how to search Wikipedia. Watch as I open the browser and look up Google Cloud Platform.

subtasks.title: Open the browser
subtasks.sonic_prompt: First, I will open the browser.
subtasks.goal: Open the web browser. If a browser is already open, bring it to the foreground.

subtasks.title: Navigate to Wikipedia
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Now I will navigate to Wikipedia.
subtasks.goal: In the browser, click on the address bar and type https://www.wikipedia.org and press Enter. Wait for the Wikipedia page to load.

subtasks.title: Search for Google Cloud Platform
subtasks.sonic_prompt: Let me search for Google Cloud Platform.
subtasks.goal: Click on the search input field on the Wikipedia homepage. Type 'Google Cloud Platform' and press Enter. Wait for the search results to load.
